name: events_create
description: Create or update an event in a specific calendar. Uses event_id for idempotent upsert: first request creates, subsequent requests update the same event.

parameters.name: calendar_id
parameters.description: The calendar ID to create the event in (path parameter).

parameters.name: event_id
parameters.description: Unique event identifier for idempotent upsert.

parameters.name: start
parameters.description: Event start time in ISO 8601 format or date string.

parameters.name: end
parameters.description: Event end time in ISO 8601 format. Must be after start.

parameters.name: transparency
parameters.description: Whether the event blocks time: 'opaque' (busy) or 'transparent' (free).

parameters.name: color
parameters.description: Hex color code for the event.

parameters.name: attendees
parameters.description: Object with 'invite' and 'remove' arrays of email addresses.

parameters.name: reminders
parameters.description: Array of reminder objects with 'minutes' before the event (max 5).
